title: Harbour Housewares Drink Cooler Bucket - Cream - Large Cold Drinks Cooler Container Metal Ice Bucket with Handles for Cold Beverages, Parties, BBQ's, Restaurant
features: Vintage Metal Design: Made from lightweight metal, this drinks cooler features a stylish, vintage look, perfect for adding charm and character to any event, whether a home gathering, corporate event, or even as a display piece.

Ample Capacity: With dimensions of Width: 48.5cm, Depth: 34cm, Height: 23cm, this large cooler is spacious enough to store a large number of drinks, keeping them cold and readily available for you and your guests throughout the night.

Dual Carry Handles: Equipped with two carry handles, this cooler offers easy portability, making it simple to transport and move the bucket around, whether you're setting it up inside or taking it outdoors for your event.

Perfect for Indoor and Outdoor Use: Designed for versatility, this cooler is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, making it ideal for a wide range of events, from home parties to outdoor barbecues and corporate functions.

Coordinated Storage Solutions: The Drinks Cooler is part of Harbour Housewares' Home and Kitchen Storage range, offering a matching collection of storage solutions that allow you to create a well-organized and stylish living space.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to pinatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! Vintage Kitchen Storage Canisters by Harbour Housewares Add some rugged industrial style and flavour to your kitchen and create the ultimate coordinated organisation station with the extensive collection of Vintage Metal Storage Canisters from Harbour Housewares. Each piece in our collection has been crafted from powder-coated metal to provide the perfect blend of lightness and durability. The stamped label on the front lets you effortlessly organise your counters & cupboards, while a tight-fitting lid help keeps contents fresher for longer. Powder-Coated Metal Construction - Lightweight and durable Vintage Industrial Styling - Perfect for that rustic farmhouse / country cottage look Easy Open Lid with Moulded Handle - Keeps contents fresh and secure For the Kitchen... Keep your favourite sweet treats, teabags, coffee beans, bloomers and other culinary essentials close at hand with our collection of Food Storage Canisters. For the Washroom... Those household cleaning tasks need be a chore no more with our Utility Canisters; featuring storage solutions for washing powder, tables and even clothes pegs! For Party Time! For those looking to become the host(ess) with the most, our Ice Buckets feature a removable inner that helps keep things cool even as your party heats up!
